features.name: Authentication & Session
features.description: Session-based authentication integrated with external dashboard menu system. Users log in via external system and session data is passed to the application.

get.description: Receives session data from external authentication system

post.summary: Exit point back to external dashboard
post.description: Clears session and returns user to external system

302.description: Redirect to /home on success, back to /login on failure

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing statistics, quick actions, recent documents, and pending approvals

get.description: Shows statistics (draft, pending, approved), quick action buttons, recent documents, and pending approvals

302.description: Redirect to login if not authenticated

features.name: Surat Tugas Management
features.description: CRUD and workflow management for Surat Tugas (Assignment Letters) including draft creation, submission, approval, rejection, and PDF generation

302.description: Redirect to document detail on success

features.name: Surat Keputusan Management
features.description: CRUD and workflow management for Surat Keputusan (Decision Letters) including draft creation, submission, approval, rejection, publishing, archiving, and PDF generation

get.summary: List all Surat Keputusan I created

302.description: Redirect to document detail on success

get.summary: List Surat Keputusan where I am a recipient
List all archived Surat Keputusan (Admin only)

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD for user accounts with roles and permissions

features.name: Jenis Tugas Management
features.description: CRUD for assignment types and sub-tasks

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Display and manage user notifications for document events

features.name: Master Kop Surat (Letterhead)
features.description: Manage letterhead configuration including logo, signature, and stamp settings

features.name: User Signature
features.description: Manage personal signature image for document signing
